subcodes.first_line: O ye who are steadfast in the Covenant! This initiative ye have undertaken in dispatching teachers to divers regions is most beloved and acceptable [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان این همّتی که در ارسال مبلّغین باطراف نموده‌اید بسیار محبوب و مقبول
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for service, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power of prayer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @firmness in the Covenant
